title: Python Context Managers
description: Python context management using the 'with' statement for resource allocation and release.
codeBlock:
with open('stats.log', 'r') as file:
    content = file.read()
    print(content)
# File is automatically closed here, even if exceptions occur
details: Context managers implement the __enter__ and __exit__ magic methods. They are widely used for file operations, database transactions, and lock allocations.
